Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:

  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

### Fix 2
Line: 61
Rule [family:Card]:
## Card Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Card component={...} id={...} innerRef={...} isClickable={...} isClicked={...} isCompact={...} isDisabled={...} isExpanded={...}>
    <CardHeader actions={...} hasWrap={...} id={...} isToggleRightAligned={...} onExpand={...} selectableActions={...} toggleButtonProps={...}>
      <CardTitle component={...} />
      <CardBody component={...} isFilled={...} />
      <CardFooter component={...} />
    </CardHeader>
    <CardTitle component={...} />
    <CardBody component={...} isFilled={...} />
    <CardFooter component={...} />
    <CardExpandableContent />
  </Card>
```

Props that stay on <Card>: component, id, innerRef, isClickable, isClicked, isCompact, isDisabled, isExpanded, isFullHeight, isLarge, isPlain, isSelectable, isSelected, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, variant

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  hasSelectableInput -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  isDisabledRaised -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  isFlat -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  isRounded -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  isSelectableRaised -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  onSelectableInputChange -> map to appropriate child component (string) => void)
  selectableInputAriaLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Add imports: CardBody, CardFooter from '@patternfly/react-core'

Prop type changes:
  CardTitle.component: keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements -> keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
  component: keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements -> keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
  component: keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements -> keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
New props on replacement:
  component: keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
  id: string
  innerRef: React.Ref<any>
  isClickable: boolean
  isClicked: boolean
  isCompact: boolean
  isDisabled: boolean
  isExpanded: boolean
  isFullHeight: boolean
  isLarge: boolean
  isPlain: boolean
  isSelectable: boolean
  isSelected: boolean
  ouiaId: number | string
  ouiaSafe: boolean
  variant: 'default' | 'secondary'


### Fix 3
Line: 91
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: CardBody

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   90              />
   91              <Button
   92                variant={ButtonVariant.link}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 76
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   75                <DescriptionListGroup>
   76                  <DescriptionListTerm>
   77                    {t('Buckets provisioned')}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/overview/object-storage-card/ObjectStorageCard.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 92):** `Button.variant` type changed - `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type union (it still includes `'link'`). The only change is that `'stateful'` was added. No code change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 61):** `Card` has `isFlat` prop which is removed in v6. The `isFlat` prop needs to be removed. Looking at the PF v6 migration guide, `isFlat` was removed and Card is flat by default in v6, so simply removing the prop is the correct migration.

**Fix 3 (Line 91):** Button icon children → `icon` prop. Looking at the current code at lines 91-100, I see the Button already has `icon={<ArrowRightIcon />}` as a prop (line 93) and the text "View buckets" as children (line 99). The icon is NOT a child — it's already in the `icon` prop. This fix appears to already be applied.

**Fix 4 (Line 76):** `DescriptionListTerm` icon children → `icon` prop. Looking at lines 76-78, the `DescriptionListTerm` contains only text `{t('Buckets provisioned')}` — no icon element. There's no icon to move. This fix is not applicable to this code.

The only real change needed is **Fix 2**: remove `isFlat={true}` from the `Card` component.
Let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** (Line 92) | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | `ButtonVariant.link` is still a valid value in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `'stateful'` — `'link'` remains valid. |
| **Fix 2** (Line 61) | Card `isFlat` removed | **Applied** | Removed `isFlat={true}` from `<Card>`. In PF v6, Card is flat by default, so removing the prop preserves the visual appearance. |
| **Fix 3** (Line 91) | Button icon children → `icon` prop | **Already applied** | The `<Button>` already has the icon as a prop (`icon={<ArrowRightIcon />}`) rather than as a child. The text `{t('View buckets')}` is correctly kept as children. No change needed. |
| **Fix 4** (Line 76) | DescriptionListTerm icon children → `icon` prop | **No change needed** | The `<DescriptionListTerm>` contains only text (`{t('Buckets provisioned')}`), not an icon element. There is no icon to migrate. |
